name: shortcut-mcp
description: MCP server for interacting with Shortcut project management - create, update, and search stories, epics, iterations, and more
long_description: The Shortcut MCP Server enables AI assistants to interact with your Shortcut workspace. Manage stories, epics, iterations, objectives, documents, and more directly through natural language. Features include creating and updating stories, searching across your workspace, managing team workflows, and organizing work with labels and iterations.

tools.name: users-get-current
tools.description: Get the current user

tools.name: users-get-current-teams
tools.description: Get a list of teams where the current user is a member

tools.name: users-list
tools.description: Get all users

tools.name: stories-get-by-id
tools.description: Get a Shortcut story by public ID

tools.name: stories-search
tools.description: Find Shortcut stories

tools.name: stories-get-branch-name
tools.description: Get a valid branch name for a specific story

tools.description: Create a new Shortcut story

tools.name: stories-update
tools.description: Update an existing Shortcut story

tools.name: stories-upload-file

tools.description: Create a comment on a story

tools.description: Get the active Shortcut iterations for the current user

api_token.title: Shortcut API Token
api_token.description: Your Shortcut API token. Generate one at https://app.shortcut.com/settings/account/api-tokens

readonly_mode.title: Read-Only Mode
readonly_mode.description: When enabled, only read operations are allowed (no creating or updating)

enabled_tools.title: Enabled Tools
enabled_tools.description: Comma-separated list of tool names to enable. Leave empty to enable all tools.
